craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Come home to a great community - Thorncroft Farms Apartments! Address: 2120 NE Thorncroft Drive Hillsboro, OR 97124 Phone: show contact info Beds: 2 / Baths: 1 / Size: 991 sq ft Monthly Price: $1896 - $2150 *Optional and usage-based charges not included. Contact office to confirm pricing details and included fees. Up to 6 Weeks Free! Thorncroft Farms Apartments, a cozy community of one, two and three bedroom apartments in Hillsboro, offers spacious floor plans that are both warm and inviting and flooded with natural light coming in through oversized windows. French doors give access to large, private balconies with mountain views. In the foreground, you can take in our meticulously landscaped grounds and outdoor amenities in the sought-after Tanasbourne neighborhood of Hillsboro. Deposit: Call Length of Lease: 3-Month, 4-Month, 5-Month, 6-Month, 7-Month, 8-Month, 9-Month, 10-Month, 11-Month, 12-Month, 13-Month, 14-Month, 15-Month Property Features: ◾ 15 minutes from downtown Portland ◾ Barbecue pavilion and picnic area ◾ Bicycle Storage ◾ Easy access to Highway 26 ◾ Front Door Trash Pickup ◾ Online Leasing ◾ Online Services ◾ Reserved parking ◾ Valet Trash ◾ Worry-free 24-hour onsite maintenance ◾ Close proximity to Intel Ronler Acres Campus ◾ Co-working lounge with complimentary Wi-Fi ◾ Heated resort-style pool with sundeck and spa ◾ Package locker with 24/7 access to packages ◾ Pet friendly (breed restrictions apply) ◾ Resident social lounge with demonstration kitchen and shuffleboard table ◾ Virtual Moving Concierge: Complimentary address change, set up home services and digital moving announcements Apartment Amenities: ◾ Fireplaces available ◾ In-home washer and dryer ◾ Large double pane windows ◾ Oversized walk-in closets ◾ Private balcony or patio ◾ Separate dining area ◾ Vaulted ceilings ◾ Breakfast bar with pendent lighting ◾ Ceiling fans in living areas and bedrooms ◾ Energy efficient zonal heating ◾ Furnished apartments available ◾ Stainless steel appliances including built-in microwave, refrigerator, and dishwasher ◾ Subway tile kitchen backsplash ◾ Wood-style plank flooring Pets: We welcome you and your pet home to an MG Properties community. Before you move in, we ask that you review our pet policy. Business Hours: Tue - Sat: 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM Ready to Lease? Phone: show contact info Website: www.apts-rental.com?n=thorncroft_farms&rp=fbyexC6n3wvR&t=wb Online Application: www.apts-rental.com?n=thorncroft_farms&rp=fbyexC6n3wvR&t=ap 3D Virtual Tour: www.apts-rental.com?n=thorncroft_farms&rp=fbyexC6n3wvR&t=trt Schedule a Tour: www.apts-rental.com?n=thorncroft_farms&rp=fbyexC6n3wvR&t=sch We only rent our apartments directly through our website or leasing office. We do not use any electronic funds transferring apps such as Zelle, Venmo, or Cashapp. All pricing, availability, fees, and terms are subject to change without notice. craigslist.title: Move Today! Spacious Two Bedroom Home with W/D
craigslist.full_address: 6850 SW Garden Home Rd, Portland, OR 97223
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post 📍 6850 SW Garden Home Rd, Portland, OR 97223 💰 Starting at $1,525/mo | Deposit: $500 🎥 Take a Virtual Tour from the comfort of your couch: 👉 https://app.cloudpano.com/tours/T-o_2j7RY Can't make it in person just yet? Walk through your future home right now with our interactive 360° virtual tour — no appointment needed! 🏠 What's Inside Your Home 2 Bedrooms | 2 Bathrooms | ~900 Sq. Ft. craigslist.title: Welcome to the Elwood in Happy Valley!
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post The Elwood 13702 SE 162nd Ave, Happy Valley, OR, 97015 Call Now - show contact info x 71 OR Text 71 to show contact info to text our team. Want more information on this unit? See link (below): https://avenue5.aptfeatures.com/ulez6g Welcome to The Elwood 2 bedroom | 2 bath | 965 square feet Features ✓  Fully Equipped Kitchen ✓  Window Coverings ✓  Disposal ✓  Full Size Washer and Dryer ✓  Breakfast Bar ✓  Large Closets ✓  Large Windows Allowing Natural Light ✓  Patio/Balcony ✓  Stainless Steel Appliances ✓  Quartz Counter-tops ✓  Subway Tile Backsplash ✓  High Ceilings in Select Homes ✓  Microwave ✓  Ample Kitchen Cabinet Space and Pantry ✓  Cable and Internet Ready ✓  Dishwasher ✓  Air Conditioner ✓  Beautiful Views Community Features ✓  Bike Racks ✓  Easy Access to Trail Leading to Hidden Falls Nature Park ✓  Next to Bus Line 155 Stop ID 13248 ✓  On-Site Maintenance ✓  Pet Friendly ✓  Controlled Access Building ✓  Short Distance to New Seasons ✓  Luxer Package System ✓  Off Street Parking ✓  On-Site Management ✓  Elevator Community Info We are open to welcome you home! The Elwood is located in Happy Valley, Oregon. The Elwood is a new multi-family development located in the Taralon community. The Elwood is a collection of one, two and three bedroom floor plans. Interior features include quartz countertops, designer kitchen cabinetry, stainless-steel kitchen appliances, full size washer and dryer and a balcony with panoramic views. The Elwood offers urban convenience with controlled access entries, interior corridors, elevators, assigned parking and bike parking as well. Just two blocks from The Elwood include New Seasons grocer, local brew pubs, spa, retail shopping, restaurants, medical and dental offices. Contact our leasing team today to learn more about The Elwood. Pet Policy Two pets are allowed per apartment home. Breed restrictions do apply. We collect a pet deposit of $400 for the first and $200 for the second, and monthly pet rent of $35 per pet. Income Requirements 3X Gross Income Office Hours Monday-Friday: 10:00AM-6:00PM Saturday: 10:00AM-5:00PM Equal Housing Opportunity z6tWNx93n

craigslist.title: TMLP 14-mo. | Easily commutable location & easy public transportation options!
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post This is a Studio , 1 Bath, Approximately 440 Sq. Ft. Want more information on this unit? See link (below): https://greystar.leasehomenow.com/5ow6eh Call Now - show contact info x 170 OR Text 170 to show contact info to text our team directly. APARTMENTS FOR RENT IN PORTLAND, OREGON Total Monthly Leasing Price (TMLP) $1,294.00 (14-month lease) Community Info: Stay plugged into the city you love when you make your home at The Addy. Proudly boasting a Walk Score of 94 and a Bike Score of 97, The Addy wants you to enjoy your connection to the city as much as you enjoy coming home. With a parking garage, bike storage and a location on the Streetcar Line, you can come and go with ease no matter how you commute. Once your home, you'll be able to unwind in the community lounge, on the terrace or inside your open-concept apartment with floor-to-ceiling windows, plank floors and designer finishes. Perfect your Portland living experience at The Addy. Offering floor plans in a variety of studio, one- and two-bedroom layouts, your perfect Portland place awaits you at The Addy. These apartments, which range in size from 418 to 779 square feet, come with contemporary features you'll love. These homes have low-VOC paint and flooring, as well as energy-efficient floor-to-ceiling windows. You can opt for polished concrete or plank flooring depending on your taste. To make life even better, every home at The Addy has a washer and dryer set. The Addy's location and commuter-friendly amenities help you maintain your connection to all that's happening in the city. The Addy is located on 18th and Northrup Street, placing you perfectly between Saturday shopping in the Pearl and Sunday brunch on 23rd. Better yet, the entire city becomes your stomping ground with easy access to the Portland Streetcar just outside your front door. Work or play is just minutes away. Features: ‣  Ceiling Fans ‣  Washer & Dryer in Every Home ‣  Open Floor Plan Design ‣  Polished Concrete Floors in Select Homes ‣  High-speed internet and cable ready ‣  Stainless Steel, Energy Star Appliances Throughout ‣  Grey Wood-Style flooring ‣  Fully-Equipped Kitchens ‣  Private Balconies on Select Styles ‣  Low VOC Paint & Flooring Materials Throughout ‣  Patios and Balconies in Select Homes ‣  Floor to Ceiling Energy Efficient Windows ‣  Designer Finishes ‣  Specious Apartment Homes Community Amenities: ‣  96% Walk Score ‣  Community Lounge and Kitchen ‣  98% Bike Score ‣  On-site Professional Management ‣  Within Walking Distance to Gyms, Bars, and Parks! ‣  Near Trader Joes, LA Fitness, and Safeway! ‣  Extra On-site Storage Available ‣  Free WiFi Access in Community Spaces ‣  Trash and Recycling on Every Floor ‣  Community Terrace with BBQ ‣  Pet Washing Station ‣  Complimentary Premium Bike Storage and Repair Station ‣  Two Zones Restaurant located on ground floor! ‣  On-site Maintenance ‣  On The Street Car Line Pet Policy: The Addy welcomes your pets! -Some size restrictions apply. -Maximum 2 pets per apartment. -Monthly pet rent of $40 per pet. -Pet deposit $300 Income Requirements: 2x the monthly rent Credit score above 500 Office Hours: Monday-Saturday: 10:00AM-6:00PM Addy 1222 NW 18th Ave, Portland, OR, 97209 Total monthly leasing prices include base rent, all mandatory monthly fees and any user-selected optional fees. Excludes variable or usage-based fees and required charges due at or prior to move-in or at move-out. Floor plans are artist’s rendering. All dimensions are approximate. Actual product and specifications may vary in dimension or detail. Not all features are available in every rental home. Prices and availability are subject to change. Base rent is based on monthly frequency. Additional fees may apply, such as but not limited to package delivery, trash, water, amenities, etc. Deposits vary. Please see a representative for details. Equal Housing Opportunity 1lpKIJOlDx

craigslist.title: Luxurious Living in the Heart of Portland! 6 weeks free rent!
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post 6 weeks free rent on all homes with a 12-month lease term. Call today for more info! Slabtown Flats 1885 Northwest Quimby Street, Portland, OR, 97209 Call Now - show contact info x 196 OR Text 196 to show contact info to contact our team. Need more information? Copy this link: https://avenue5.aptfeatures.com/srjkra DISTINCTLY PORTLAND. DISTINCTLY YOU. 2 bedroom | 2 bath | 925 square feet Features ✓  Durable Plank Flooring ✓  Full or Juliet Balconies in Select Homes ✓  Ceramic Tile Backsplash ✓  Polarstone Quartz Countertops with Custom Marbling ✓  Premium Custom Closet Organizers Made of Solid Wood ✓  Washer & Dryer ✓  Large Stainless-Steel Farm Sink ✓  Air Conditioning in All Homes ✓  French Door Refrigerator with In-Door Water & Ice ✓  Stainless-Steel GE Energy Star Appliances Community Features ✓  Secured bike room in addition to complimentary in-unit bicycle racks upon request ✓  Club Room outfitted for entertaining with kitchen, fireplace, TV, shuffleboard and gaming table ✓  Onsite parking available with 4 EV charging stations ✓  Lobby Lounge with Hosted Local Coffee ✓  Year-round rooftop terrace with panoramic views, gas grilling area, fire table and lounge seating ✓  Fully equipped fitness studio with roll-up garage door ✓  Private meeting room with Smart TV ✓  Resident parcel delivery lockers by Luxer One with 24/7 video surveillance Community Info CALL OR VISIT US FOR A TOUR TODAY! Eclectic. Historic. Inspired. Slabtown is all of this and more. The beloved Northwest Portland neighborhood is home to our favorite grocery stores, breweries, restaurants and shops while also keeping us within walking distance of the most prominent areas of Nob Hill, the Alphabet District and the Pearl. An unrivaled location offering convenience and excitement all in one magical pocket of Portland. Thoughtful community spaces throughout the building are designed with you in mind. We've studied the neighborhood and curated a selection of amenities that complements your home at Slabtown Flats. This includes a more efficient fitness studio that will fill in on days when you're not partaking in Industrial Barre, Studio Blue or NW Pilates. Also offering an open rooftop terrace that includes partial coverage, allowing for year-round use and a community lounge that can be reserved for private events or used for informal gatherings. Superior quality and open, adaptable spaces serve as the hallmarks of each studio, one- and two-bedroom apartment available at Slabtown Flats. Floor plans are designed to be flexible and accommodate the way you live, prioritizing natural light and air flow. Reserve your brand new home today! Pet Policy We love our furry friends! We welcome 2 pets per apartment home. Cats and dogs are allowed with no weight limit. Please call our leasing office for complete pet policy. Office Hours Monday-Friday: 9:00AM-6:00PM Equal Housing Opportunity 9hE1CJyO

craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post This is a Studio , 1 Bath, Approximately 579 Sq. Ft. Interested in more information? See link below: https://avenue5.aptfeatures.com/uziayn Call Now - show contact info x 79 OR Text 79 to show contact info to text our team directly. Luxury in the Details. Welcome to The Canopy at Powell, a brand-new apartment community in Southeast Portland offering modern studio, one-, and two-bedroom apartments designed for comfort and convenience. Located on vibrant SE Powell Boulevard, residents enjoy easy access to Portland’s best dining, shopping, parks, bike trails, and entertainment. Our thoughtfully designed apartment homes feature modern finishes, open layouts, energy-efficient appliances, and plenty of natural light. Community amenities include a resident lounge, secure bike storage, controlled-access entry, package services, and professionally managed shared spaces. With convenient access to downtown Portland, Hawthorne, Division, Belmont, public transit, and nearby employers, The Canopy at Powell offers a connected urban lifestyle in one of Portland’s most desirable neighborhoods. Discover modern apartment living in SE Portland. Schedule a tour today and explore The Canopy at Powell. Amenities Include: Ceiling Fan Vaulted Ceilings Cable Ready Dishwasher Open Floor Plans Curved Shower Rods Key Fob Entry Luxury Vinyl Flooring Dog Run Efficient Appliances Bike Room Controlled Access Call: show contact info For more information, visit us at: https://livewithquantum.com/o4fy2ute/canopy-apartments-at-powell

Copy this link: https://greystar.leasehomenow.com/vyc2he Welcome Home to The Aria 1 bedroom | 1 bath | 754 square feet Total Monthly Leasing Price (TMLP) $2,048.78 (12-month lease) Features ✓  Open-concept living areas ✓  Window roller shades ✓  Townhomes featuring heightened finishes, private patios w/ separate entries ✓  Secure, dedicated on-site parking structure ✓  Gleaming quartz countertops ✓  Oversized, expansive windows ✓  Air conditioning ✓  Modern, stylish flooring ✓  High speed internet ✓  Fully equipped kitchens ✓  Pantry ✓  Washer and dryer ✓  Controlled access ✓  Cable ready with choice of three providers ✓  Tile backsplash ✓  Large walk-in closets ✓  Private patios or balconies ✓  Stainless steel appliances Community Features ✓  Disposal Chutes ✓  Storage Space ✓  Controlled Access ✓  Renters Insurance Program ✓  Bike Storage ✓  Package concierge ✓  Kayak Storage ✓  Gameroom ✓  Lounge ✓  Grill ✓  Courtyard ✓  Pet Wash ✓  Courtyard Hammocks ✓  Elevator ✓  Package Service ✓  Dry Cleaning Service ✓  Online Services ✓  Sundeck w/ Hammocks ✓  Walking/Biking Trails ✓  Recycling ✓  Fitness Center ✓  Public Transportation ✓  Waterfront walking Distance ✓  Billards Room ✓  Maintenance on site Community Info The Aria is the gateway to both the excitement of the waterfront and the established community vibe that’s unique to Vancouver, WA. Our amenities are just as unexpected and tailored to your every need. Sneak in a morning workout in the fitness center. Don’t worry about commuting – The Aria has workstation pods and multiple Wi-Fi speed options. At the end of the day, blow off steam in our gaming lounge, or invite friends for dinner-and-a-view in our spacious outdoor living room. Pet Policy Restrictions: breed restrictions apply $400 Deposit $50 Monthly Pet Rent $200 Fee 2 Pet Limit Office Hours Monday-Friday:10:00AM-6:00PM Saturday-Sunday:10:00AM-5:00PM Total monthly leasing prices include base rent, all mandatory monthly fees and any user-selected optional fees. Actual product and specifications may vary in dimension or detail. Not all features are available in every rental home. Prices and availability are subject to change. Base rent is based on monthly frequency. Additional fees may apply, such as but not limited to package delivery, trash, water, amenities, etc. Deposits vary. Please see a representative for details. Apartments For Rent in Portland, Oregon Total Monthly Leasing Price (TMLP) $1,303.00 (13-month lease) Community Info: Capture the essence of the downtown Portland living experience! Park Plaza Apartments for rent is a walker's paradise. Your new neighborhood in Portland's Cultural District, encompasses the Portland Art Museum and Oregon Historical Society. Park Plaza is a controlled access building adjacent to Portland State University, with easy freeway access to I-5, 405 and 26. Major bus lines, max light rail and the Portland Street Car are nearby. Yes, all of the best of downtown right at your doorstep. Then again, you might just as well prefer the solitude and breathtaking cityscapes back at home, on the roof-top garden; urban outdoors never looked so inviting. Garage and outdoor parking spaces are available to rent. Newly remodeled studios, one-, and two-bedroom floor plans feature hardwood floors throughout, as well as extras like ceiling fans. All apartment homes feature picturesque views from a wall of windows, allowing for that bright and airy feeling. Garage and outdoor parking spaces are also available to rent. At Park Plaza you'll find the kind of quintessential Portland charm that can only be found in the heart of downtown Portland and the Park Blocks. Best of all, we are a pet-friendly apartment community in Portland, offering homes with no weight limits for your furry friends. Park Plaza is managed by a team of professionals, always willing to help you make the most of your new home. So, if you're looking for all the luxuries of downtown living, you've found it at Park Plaza. Features: ‣  Hardwood floors ‣  Bay windows ‣  Dishwasher in select apartments ‣  Stainless Steel Appliances in select apartments ‣  Ceiling fans ‣  Expansive closets ‣  Breakfast nook Community Amenities: ‣  Garage parking and outdoor parking available ‣  Expansive sundeck ‣  Package receiving ‣  On-site management ‣  On-site laundry ‣  Short-term leases ‣  Controlled access ‣  Resident Lounge ‣  Storage space ‣  Fitness studio ‣  BBQ grills ‣  On-site maintenance ‣  Convenient interior elevators ‣  Near public transportation Pet Policy: Pets of all sizes are welcome at Park Plaza. Please call for details about our pet policy show contact info . Your pets will love it here! Welcome to The Archibald Apartments Located in beautiful, upper East Multnomah County: the gateway to the Columbia River Gorge, and the world-class Timberline ski and recreation area. This boutique community offers one and two-bedroom apartment homes, with stainless steel appliances, modern finishes, and a washer and dryer in each home. craigslist.title: 1 MONTH FREE! - Enjoy Woodstock Community Center | One Bedroom
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Tristin Square offers residents a perfect blend of convenience and charm, situated close to major roadways such as I-5, I-405, I-205, and I-84, making commuting and exploring the vibrant Woodstock neighborhood simple and effortless. Public transit access is plentiful, providing an easy way to navigate the area and reach downtown Portland, which is only seven miles away for additional shopping, dining, and entertainment options. The community features on-site laundry facilities with app-controlled machines, as well as assigned parking spaces, ensuring practicality and ease for residents with vehicles. Architecturally, the neighborhood showcases diverse styles like Portland four-square houses, Cape Cods, and bungalows, adding to its unique character. Our Amenities Dishwasher Assigned Parking Large Closets Parks, Sports Fields & Jogging Paths Close Close to Transit Close Proximity to Shopping & Restaurants On-Site Laundry Facilities Ample Storage for Your Clothes and Belongings Freeway Close A Reliable Place to Park Your Vehicle show contact info Tristin Square Outdoor amenities include Woodstock Park, offering sports fields, jogging paths, a playground, picnic areas, and an off-leash dog zone, perfect for active lifestyles and fun. Local dining is diverse, with popular spots along Woodstock Boulevard serving international cuisine, from Salvadoran to Asian Fusion and French-Mediterranean fare. The Woodstock Community Center hosts neighborhood events, classes, and gatherings, fostering a strong sense of community. Additionally, residents enjoy urban gardening projects, community gardens, and nearby specialty shops and dive bars like the Starlight Knitting Society and Misdemeanor Meadows, embracing the area's eclectic and peaceful atmosphere.

craigslist.title: Freeway Close, Vintage, Peaceful, and Convenient - See Our 2 Bedroom
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Tristin Square show contact info 6206 SE 52nd Avenue This unit is situated within Tristin Square, a community that offers ample storage for your clothes and belongings, along with convenient on-site laundry facilities featuring app-ran machines. Residents enjoy easy access to public transit, making commuting and exploring the nearby Woodstock neighborhood effortless. The community is characterized by a blend of urban style and suburban peacefulness, with a lush, pastoral feel and a variety of architectural styles such as Portland four-square houses, Cape Cods, and bungalows. Tristin Square provides a reliable parking space per unit, ensuring that parking is always convenient. The community also hosts neighborhood events, clean-ups, and forums through the local association, creating a welcoming and engaged environment. Feature List ** Parks, Sports Fields & Jogging Paths Close ** Vintage, Peaceful, and Convenient ** Ceiling Fans & Individually Controlled Heat ** A Reliable Place to Park Your Vehicle ** Close to Transit ** Close Proximity to Shopping & Restaurants ** On-Site Laundry Facilities ** Dishwasher ** Assigned Parking ** Large Closets The surrounding area of Woodstock and Brentwood-Darlington offers a vibrant and diverse neighborhood full of character and natural beauty. The Woodstock neighborhood is known for its unique architectural styles, lush parks, and numerous shopping opportunities along Woodstock Boulevard. Nature lovers will appreciate the many parks, including Woodstock Park, which features an off-leash dog area, sports fields, jogging paths, and picnic spots. Nearby attractions include the Oregon Museum of Science and Industry (OMSI), the Portland Children's Museum, and the International Rose Test Garden, providing engaging activities for everyone. The area boasts a variety of dining options from international cuisines at local favorites like Cartlandia food truck buffet to charming specialty shops and dive bars such as the Starlight Knitting Society. Educational institutions like Woodstock Elementary School, Brentwood-Darlington Community School, and Portland Community College are also within the neighborhood, offering excellent local educational opportunities. With easy access to major highways like I-5, I-405, I-205, and I-84, plus proximity to Downtown Portland just seven miles away, residents can enjoy both a peaceful neighborhood and convenient city amenities.

craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Township Sherwood 22210 SW Murdock Rd, Sherwood, OR, 97140 Interested In This Unit? Welcome To Township Sherwood 2 Bedroom, 2 Bath | Approximately 900 Sq. Ft. Community Info: Looking for quiet country living with convenient downtown access? Your search ends here. Township Sherwood is located on a tree-lined corner just 5-minutes from charming Old Town Sherwood and offers residents the perfect place to relax and enjoy. From large windows that welcome sunlight to the plush carpet beneath your toes, our 2 bedroom - 2 bathroom apartments have everything you need to make you feel at home. The kitchens are equipped with full-sized appliances so you can experiment with new ingredients, and there’s plenty of closet space for all of your knick-knacks. Each apartment has its very own private balcony or patio where you can take in the landscaping, and many apartments have fireplaces so you can curl up with a good book on a chilly day and luxuriate in the warmth. Need to work up a sweat after a long day? We have you covered with our on-site fitness center or you can join a game of pickup basketball at our outdoor court. The large grassy park is perfect for your downward-facing dogs or for a game of fetch with your pooch. Yes - our apartments are pet friendly! We also have a covered picnic area, a great place to catch up with neighbors or watch as your little ones play on the swings in the children’s play area. Township Sherwood is nestled between Portland and Oregon's scenic wine trail, and this community’s address gives you access to one of the best public school systems in the state. You’ll also love the convenience of living near major employers like Intel, Nike, and Amazon, as well as numerous shops and restaurants including the nearby Parkway Village shopping center. Have a question or want to learn more about life at Township Sherwood? Give us a call, our professional leasing team is ready and waiting to help you find your perfect home. craigslist.title: VISIT US - HUGE INTERIORS + Nearby Dining, Shopping, Entertainment
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Heritage Crossing Townhomes show contact info 4483 SE Roethe Rd Milwaukie OR 97267 Heritage Crossing Townhomes provides a peaceful and convenient living experience just eight miles from Downtown Portland, making it an ideal choice for those seeking a suburban retreat with easy access to the city. The community features a charming green courtyard where neighbors can connect and enjoy the outdoors, all while being protected from the noise of urban life. With only 44 units, this medium-sized community fosters a close-knit atmosphere, offering residents a sense of tranquility and belonging. Each apartment includes private patios, energy-efficient windows with window coverings, dishwashers, and spacious closets, combining comfort with practicality. Private Patio Disposal Large Closets Suburbs Of Milwaukie Refrigerator Dishwasher Easy Access To Dining, Shopping, and Entertainment Energy Efficient Windows Window Coverings BBQ Area Range The neighborhood is highly walkable and bike-friendly, with wide suburban streets to explore and two parks within 3.5 miles for outdoor recreation. Commuters will appreciate the quick drive to Portland International Airport and the easy access to Highway 99 East for quick trips to downtown Portland. Nearby, residents can enjoy a variety of dining, shopping, and entertainment options, along with newer apartment developments along the outskirts of the residential areas. Heritage Crossing is a great choice for those looking for a blend of luxury, convenience, and a peaceful community setting in one of the area's most up-and-coming neighborhoods.

The community features upscale one- and two-bedroom apartments with high ceilings, stainless steel appliances, walk-in closets, and in-home air conditioning, ensuring convenience and style. Outdoor enthusiasts can enjoy nearby parks, trails, and the Tualatin River National Wildlife Refuge, while those who prefer staying active will appreciate the 24-hour fitness studio and dog park. The neighborhood's location provides easy access to major highways, making a trip to downtown Portland just a thirty-minute drive, and offering quick connections for commuters. https://www. pacificridgeapts. com/ Residents benefit from a variety of amenities including covered parking, additional storage, and high-speed internet, all designed to enhance daily life. The area boasts a vibrant community with local shops, dining options, boutique stores, and vineyards, perfect for weekend outings. Nestled on Bull Mountain, the community enjoys a peaceful, wooded setting with small-town charm, yet remains close to the energetic pulse of Tigard and Portland. Whether relaxing at home or exploring the surrounding natural beauty, Pacific Ridge provides a balanced lifestyle in a picturesque location.

craigslist.title: Peaceful 3-Bedroom NW Portland Retreat on 2 Acres with Pasture Views
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Enjoy the rare combination of privacy, space, and natural beauty in this 1,735 sq. ft. 3-bedroom rental located in NW Portland near Old Germantown Road. Set on approximately 2 acres, this peaceful home overlooks a quiet pasture where horses graze, offering a beautiful natural setting with trees, flowers, open space, and a well-maintained landscape. The home features a full kitchen with appliances, an additional refrigerator, a walk-in pantry for excellent storage, a spacious living room, air conditioning, gas heating, and a decorative chrome fireplace. Washer/dryer, water, garbage, and satellite TV are included. A large exterior generator helps keep the electricity running during weather-related power outages, adding extra peace of mind during stormy seasons. Additional features include: • 3 bedrooms / 1 bathroom • 1,735 sq. ft. • Full kitchen with appliances • Extra refrigerator • Walk-in pantry • Washer/dryer included • Water, garbage, and satellite TV included • Air conditioning and gas heat • Large cement patio for BBQs, outdoor dining, or relaxing • Private driveway with direct access to double-door entry • Off-street parking • Peaceful pasture views • Cats considered • No smoking This is a wonderful home for someone who values peace, privacy, and a beautiful natural setting while still being within reach of NW Portland, Bethany, Skyline, and the surrounding areas. Desired move-in date: July 6. Showings are available by appointment. Please call 503.240.1842 and ask for Ann.

Desired move-in date: July 6. Showings are available by appointment. Please call 503.240.1842 and ask for Ann.

craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Beds: 2 Baths: 2 Square Feet: 922 Use this link for more info: https://greystar.leasehomenow.com/4awxy7 Charming City LIving Call Now - show contact info x 124 OR Text 124 to show contact info to contact our leasing team.   Total Monthly Leasing Price (TMLP) $2,349.00 (15-month lease) Community Info Welcome to Linden-your gateway to life without limits. Our 1 & 2-bedroom apartments in Portland's eclectic East Burnside area blend bold design with the comforts of home. Enjoy sleek granite countertops, full-size washer and dryer, and city views from stylish interiors that match the energy of the Buckman neighborhood. Step outside and you're minutes from SE Hawthorne, East Burnside, and the Central Eastside's buzzing business corridor. craigslist.title: 4 WEEKS FREE - Newly Remodeled & Large Kitchen | 2 Bed #23 - Pets OK
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Springbrook 10080 SW 5th Street, Beaverton OR 97005 (Unit 23) Bedrooms: 2 Bathrooms: 2 Call us today! show contact info Springbrook Apartments offer spacious living in a serene setting within the highly desirable Raleigh West neighborhood of Beaverton. The community features a peaceful oasis with lush greenery, including year-round creek runs that add to its tranquil atmosphere. Residents enjoy generous storage space and in-suite washers and dryers, along with a variety of chic floor plans to choose from. The community is designed to make residents feel at home, with a friendly team ready to assist in finding the perfect apartment to match their lifestyle. Located just seconds from walking and biking paths, Springbrook provides a blend of comfort and convenience in a picturesque environment. New Washer/Dryer Newly Renovated Free Carport Parking About the community Springbrook Apartments are conveniently located near several notable attractions in Beaverton. You can explore the Oregon Zoo, a renowned regional landmark, or visit the Washington Park, which offers extensive trails and scenic views. For shopping and entertainment, the Cedar Hills Crossing shopping center provides a variety of retail stores and dining options. Additionally, residents can enjoy nearby parks like Fanno Creek Greenway and Nature Park, as well as cultural venues such as the Beaverton Civic Theatre. This area combines outdoor recreation, entertainment, and retail experiences, making it an appealing place to reside.

Total Monthly Leasing Price (TMLP) $1,810.00 (13-month lease) Community Info: Landmark at Tanasbourne Apartments in Hillsboro, Oregon offers newly updated one, two, and three bedroom apartment homes. Expertly located on the border between Beaverton and Hillsboro, our peaceful neighborhood setting is an escape from the daily hustle, yet close to Highway 26 for easy access to downtown Portland and the beautiful Oregon coast. The Streets of Tanasbourne, Whole Foods Market, Regal Cinemas, Intel and Kaiser Permanente are all within a 5 minute drive away. Landmark is also close to great schools in the Beaverton and Hillsboro school district. For today's active lifestyle, residents at Landmark enjoy a refreshing shimmering pool, relaxing spa, state-of-the-art fitness facility and racquetball court. Best of all, Landmark is pet-friendly and welcomes your fury, four-legged friends! Our exceptional service, location and customer service will impress you. Call for a tour today. craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Beds: 1 Baths: 1 Square Feet: 764 Follow The Link Below: https://greystar.leasehomenow.com/4e7v18 Welcome to Oak Street Lofts Call Now - show contact info x 12 OR Text 12 to show contact info to chat!   Total Monthly Leasing Price (TMLP) $1,960.00 (13-month lease) Community Info At Oak Street Lofts, we seamlessly blend luxury, comfort, and convenience to provide our residents with an apartment community unlike any other. Our brand new studio, one, and two bedroom Tigard apartments are flooded with natural light and feature open living spaces with gorgeous wood-style plank flooring. The Place You Deserve 3 Bedroom, 2 Bath | Approximately 1077 Sq. Ft. Community Info: Welcome to The Ramona The Ramona offers affordable, family-sized apartments in an energy-efficient building located in Portland's Pearl District. A Few Important Things to Know Income Limits - To qualify to live at the Ramona, your household must meet the income requirements . Student Households – There are a few exceptions, but, in general, households made up entirely of full-time students are not eligible to live at the Ramona . Occupancy – The Ramona has a minimum number of residents per apartment. Availability – There are no current vacancies. We maintain a waiting list and encourage you to consider signing up.   Unit Highlights ✧  Kitchen Storage ✧  High Ceilings ✧  Balconies ✧  Interior Bedrooms ✧  Fully equipped kitchens ✧  Green and Energy Efficient ✧  Bedroom Closets ✧  Ceiling Fans ✧  Windows ✧  Healthy Indoor Air Community Highlights ✧  Furnished Lounges ✧  Outdoor Courtyard ✧  BBQ/Picnic Area ✧  Building Access ✧  Fitness Room ✧  Underground Parking ✧  Bicycle Parking ✧  Community Room ✧  Laundry Rooms Office Hours Monday-Friday: 9:00AM-6:00PM Saturday: 10:00AM-5:00PM Pet Policy Cats - 2 allowed, Max weight 40 lb each, Deposit $400.00 Restrictions: 2 Cats or 1 Dog Only Dogs - 1 allowed, Max weight 40 lb each, Deposit $600.00 Income Requirements Apartments at the Ramona are available to households earning up to 60% of the Median Family Income (MFI) for the Portland metropolitan area. Welcome Home to Waterleaf Apartments Community Info: Waterleaf brings 178 affordable apartments to Portland's amenity-rich South Waterfront area. Consisting of studio, one-, two-, and three-bedroom apartments, the property is located directly next to the Portland Streetcar station and close to the MAX light rail. Walk score of 98, biker's paradise! Unique to the immediate area: the new Tillikum Crossing, a pedestrian/public transit bridge providing access to the close-in east side, as well as convenient access to the Oregon Health and Sciences University (OHSU) Waterfront and Marquam Hill campuses. All utilities covered except for electricity and cable/internet. We also have resident social services located on site! Section 8 and Housing-Choice Vouchers Accepted! We are a HUD regulated property with income MINIMUM and MAXIMUM limits. 2026 Household Gross Income Limits: 1 Person: 1.5x monthly rent (min.) - $49,560 (max) 2 People: 1.5x monthly rent (min.) - $59,580 (max) 3 People: 1.5x monthly rent (min.) - $67,020 (max) **As a HUD property, our move-in process is more involved and can take up to a month to complete; please consider this fact when planning your application** At minimum the information we require will include: -All sources of income and verifications for each -All assets and verifications for each -Student status IMMEDIATE AVAILABILITY and NO APP FEES Features: ‣  Efficient Appliances ‣  Dishwasher ‣  Ceiling Fan ‣  Refrigerator ‣  Air Conditioner Community Amenities: ‣  On-Site Management ‣  Section 8 Housing Choice Vouchers Accepted ‣  Laundry Facilities ‣  Garage ‣  Community Room with Kitchen and Free WiFi ‣  All Utilities Covered (Except Electricity and Cable/Internet) ‣  BBQ/Picnic Area and Playground ‣  98 Walkscore (Biker and Transit Paradise) ‣  On-Site Social Services Coordinator ‣  ADA Accessible Pet Policy: Allowed | Max weight 20 lb each Deposit $300 Income Requirements: We are a HUD regulated property with income MINIMUMS and MAXIMUMS. The minimum income requirement is always 1.5x the monthly rent. The maximums are based on household size: 2026 Household Gross Income Limits: 1 Person: 1.5x monthly rent (min.) - $49,560 (max) 2 People: 1.5x monthly rent (min.) - $59,580 (max) 3 People: 1.5x monthly rent (min.) - $67,020 (max) Office Hours: Monday-Friday: 9:00AM-5:00PM Waterleaf Apartments 2065 S River Parkway, Portland, OR, 97201 Equal Housing Opportunity YIL7BjyW1

From expansive residences and enticing amenities to an ideal location near Interstate 205, you’ll love everything about this pet-friendly community! Set just southeast of downtown Milwaukie, these apartments are close to public transportation stops and several popular attractions. Enjoy living near the shops at Clackamas Town Center, the nature trails at Mount Talbert Nature Park, an eclectic assortment of eateries and so much more. Income restrictions apply. We currently have a waitlist for our 3 bedroom units and are scheduling for application appointments for coming available 2 bedroom, 1 bedroom and studio apartments. Stop by the office to be added to the waitlist, as it requires a hard signature. Call for any questions and staff will be able to assist. Office hours are Monday-Friday 10am-5pm. Welcome Home to Oak Hill Community Info: Nestled in Portland's Bethany neighborhood, Oak Hill Apartments offer stylish one- and two-bedroom homes designed for comfort and convenience. Residents enjoy resort-style amenities including a heated pool, sauna, spa, fitness center, clubhouse, business center, and covered parking. With easy access to Sunset Highway 26 and Cornell Boulevard, this pet-friendly community is just minutes from Bethany Village, Tanasbourne Mall, and downtown-not to mention shopping, dining, and major employers. Come home to Oak Hill-where comfort, location, and community converge. Welcome Home to the Abigail Community Info: Located in the north end of Portland’s Pearl District, the newly built Abigail--named for equal-rights pioneer Abigail Scott Duniway--is a high quality, inclusive community that provides easy access to everything this dynamic neighborhood has to offer. Easily one of Portland's most desirable neighborhoods, the Pearl District is home to some of the city's most popular restaurants, shops, boutiques, galleries, and entertainment in the heart of downtown. The Abigail's proximity to the city's craft breweries, artisan coffee shops, and public transit via the MAX and Portland Streetcar are a delight to residents. The Abigail is built to achieve a LEED for Homes Gold rating. Our beautiful apartments feature studio, one-, two- and three-bedroom floor plans. Property amenities include two landscaped courtyards, a children’s play area, resident-reserved parking, and a tool-equipped bike storage room. Welcome home to The Abigail! Features: ‣  Full Exhaust Range Hoods ‣  Patio/Balcony [ 1 ] ‣  In Unit W/D [ 1 ] ‣  High-Speed Internet Upgrade Optional ‣  Energy Star Dishwasher in 1, 2 & 3 Bedrooms ‣  Quartz Countertops [ 1 ] ‣  Painted Accent Wall in Living Room ‣  Phone and Cable Ready ‣  Large Closets ‣  Carpet in Bedrooms ‣  Free In-Unit WiFi ‣  Energy Star Refrigerator and Range ‣  Large Windows ‣  Stainless Steel Kitchen Appliances [ 1 ] ‣  Ceiling Fan with Light in Bedroom ‣  Built-in Closet Shelving System 1. select units Community Amenities: ‣  On-Site Maintenance ‣  Bike Mechanic Station ‣  Free Full Building WiFi Access ‣  Underground Parking ‣  Community Gathering Spaces on Each Floor ‣  Laundry Facilities ‣  Playground ‣  Guest Suite, available for small nightly cost ‣  Large capacity washer/dryer (select units) ‣  Elevator ‣  Large Community Room ‣  Multiple Landscaped Courtyards ‣  Public Transportation - Portland Streetcar and Trimet Bus Service ‣  Ample Bike Parking Pet Policy: Pets - Max 2 allowed Comments: Breed restrictions and additional charges may apply please call the leasing office for details. Restrictions: Indoor Cats and Breed restrictions for Dogs apply. Office Hours: Monday-Sunday: 9:00AM-6:00PM The Abigail 1650 NW 13th Avenue, Portland, OR, 97209 Equal Housing Opportunity qMf5oSNa2

Covered parking options provide added convenience, while on-site laundry rooms are accessible around the clock to simplify daily routines. Spacious Apartments for Rent in SE Portland, Oregon Total Monthly Leasing Price (TMLP) $2,100.00 (12-month lease) Community Info: Welcome to Garden Park Apartments, where the tranquility of nature meets the vibrant lifestyle of SE Portland. Our prime location across from Reed College makes Garden Park Apartments a highly sought-after choice for those looking for apartments for rent in SE Portland, Oregon. Our community offers spacious two-bedroom apartments with a private balcony or patio, perfect for enjoying the beautiful surroundings. Garden Park is a pet-friendly community, welcoming your furry friends to explore our expansive grounds. The versatile floor plans let you personalize your living space, bringing your creative vision to life. We've taken apartment living to new heights with services and facilities to make you feel at home. Our beautifully landscaped grounds feature native plants, weeping willows, and rolling grasses, providing a serene environment like a permanent weekend retreat. Despite being nestled in the heart of Oregon's largest city, our Southeast Portland apartments offer a peaceful escape. Enjoy easy access to unique restaurants, shopping, and entertainment venues. For those who enjoy nightlife, we're just minutes from downtown Portland and the lively SE neighborhoods of Hawthorne, Division, and Woodstock. Each area brings its own unique charm and vibrant hotspots. If you have any questions or need further assistance, our friendly and professional staff is here to help. Schedule a tour or visit us today to discover your new SE Portland, Oregon home! Features: ‣  Large closets ‣  Separate dining area ‣  Dishwasher ‣  King-sized bedroom ‣  Washer and dryer* ‣  Private balcony/patio ‣  Energy-efficient windows ‣  Garbage disposal ‣  Electric range ‣  Air conditioning* Community Amenities: ‣  Seasonal resident gatherings ‣  Renovated fitness center ‣  Mature landscaping in a park-like setting ‣  Pool & sundeck lounge ‣  Beautiful landscaping ‣  Across from Reed College and Community Garden ‣  Extra guest parking ‣  Resident newsletter ‣  Smoke-free community ‣  Close to Tri-Met public transportation ‣  Coffee station ‣  Covered parking available ‣  Nearby restaurants and shops Pet Policy: Garden Park welcomes two pets per apartment. Each pet will have a $200 addition to the refundable security deposit, as well as a $30 monthly premium. Garden Park welcomes dogs, with no weight limit, but some breed restrictions. Indoor cats are also welcome at our property. Unfortunately, caged animals are not allowed. craigslist.title: $1,325 / 1br - 576ft2 - 1bd ADU in Great SE Location
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post This ad is for 1bd 1ba ADU in a great SE Portland location - less than 5 minutes to Woodstock, Fred Meyer and New Seasons, Mt. Scott Community Center, and Cartlandia! Large great room and full storage attic, plus a large outdoor storage shed! There is a free washer/dryer in a shared laundry room as well. You would share a fully fenced backyard with a tenant in the main house. This kind of living arrangement can be wonderful if the chemistry works... opportunities for pets (negotiable), sharing a large yard, and gardening! We are landlords who live nearby and not a property management company. We are looking for a 12 month lease and ask first month's rent as well as a 1-month's rent security deposit up-front (last month's rent not required). Garbage is included in the rent and water is invoiced by the landlord. Tenant pays for their own power. The unit is vacant and available for move-in immediately. You must schedule an appointment to see the unit in order to submit an application. We check all references, employment, credit, and criminal history. There is no application fee, but if you pass the initial screening we will ask for reimbursement on the background check (roughly $45/applicant). We use the City of Portland's First-Come-First-Served system and Tenant Screening Criteria. Section 8 welcome. Please let us know if you have any questions. Thanks for your interest and good luck with your search!

craigslist.title: Savor Life in Portland's Cultural District
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post 4 weeks free only! *restrictions apply* Storyline 1177 SW Market St, Portland, OR, 97201 Call Now - show contact info x 256 OR Text 256 to show contact info to text our leasing team. Interested in more information? See link below: https://avenue5.aptfeatures.com/yr5isu DISCOVER THE UNEXPECTED studio | 1 bath | 446 square feet Features ✓  Industrial Aesthetic ✓  Energy Star Stainless Steel Appliances ✓  Plank-style Flooring ✓  In-home Laundry ✓  In-home Wall-mounted Bike Storage ✓  Exposed Ductwork ✓  Quartz Countertops Community Features ✓  Coffee Bar ✓  Rooftop Lounge ✓  Free Wi-Fi in Common Areas ✓  Peloton and Fitness On-Demand ✓  Pet Washing Station ✓  Resident Lobby ✓  Clubroom with Fully Equipped Kitchen ✓  Fitness Studio ✓  Skyline and Mountain Views Community Info To know someone’s story is to know them from the inside out. It can take time to discover the unexpected – to truly understand each layer. At Storyline, the unexpected begins on our stunning rooftop deck with unobstructed views to the south and east of downtown Portland. You’ll find it easy to crush fitness goals in our professionally outfitted fitness studio, complete with Peloton bikes. From a coffee bar in the lobby to a designated place to wash your pup, Storyline offers a distinctively smart living experience in a thriving downtown Portland neighborhood. Influenced by the Cultural District and our academic neighbors, Storyline celebrates the spirit of continued learning and growth through experiential connections. You’re invited to explore the museums and performance venues, to buy local goods from the year-round Farmer’s Market in the South Park Blocks and to dine at some of Portland’s most quintessential eateries. At Storyline, we hope no two days are the same. Write your next chapter. Pet Policy Storyline welcomes your dogs & cats. Our homes accommodate up to 2 pets per home with no weight limit. Monthly pet rent is required. Breed restrictions apply. Please contact our leasing office for more information. Income Requirements Two times the stated rent. Office Hours Monday-Friday: 10:00AM-5:00PM Saturday-Sunday: 10:30AM-4:30PM Equal Housing Opportunity SjO6pHpdEVNJ

craigslist.title: Walkable, Pet Friendly Area - Lots to See + Two Bedroom Near it All
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Halsey Summit show contact info 17062 NE Halsey Street Special Price: 1300 Bedrooms: 2 Bathrooms: 1 Halsey Summit offers spacious apartment homes in a vibrant and eclectic neighborhood that is perfect for anyone. Residents enjoy large living rooms, separate dining areas, and generous living spaces designed for comfort and convenience. The community boasts remarkable cost-effective pricing and a quaint courtyard setting with covered patios, making it an ideal spot for relaxation and socializing. With easy access to Interstate 84 and public transportation, commuting to downtown Portland or Gresham is quick and effortless, placing residents near shopping, restaurants, cafes, and public parks. The location is highly desirable, situated between two thriving urban centers and close to schools, parks, and recreational facilities such as Glendover Golf & Tennis. On-site playground, and 24-hour maintenance service, ensuring a safe and well-maintained environment. Pet owners can enjoy the pet-friendly policies that welcome cats and dogs. When seeking an apartment, Halsey Summit stands out as a versatile and welcoming option in an up-and-coming area on the rise in east Portland. APARTMENT AND COMMUNITY AMENITIES ➢ Playground ➢ Freeway Access ➢ Close to 24HR Fitness ➢ Convenient Location ➢ On-site Maintenance ➢ Close to Shopping ➢ Close Glendover Golf & Tennis ➢ On-Site Laundry Facilities ➢ Quaint Courtyard ➢ Separate Dining Space ➢ Large Living Room ➢ Covered Patio

No matter which floor plan you select, you’ll feel at home inside a spacious layout, The Felix @ Our Heroes Place offers residents an elevated lifestyle in an upscale urban oasis with amenities to meet almost any resident need across our three unique buildings. ABOUT COMMUNITY: Everything you need to elevate your everyday At Russellville Commons, we've curated a host of amenities to elevate your living experience and simplify your day-to-day. Whether preparing a meal in your gourmet kitchen or breaking a sweat and letting off steam in our state-of-the-art fitness center, we've got everything you need to live life on your own terms. Outside your front door, you'll find a limitless opportunity for relaxing, socializing, and staying active. In our pet-friendly apartments, we've combined upgraded details, including wood-style plank flooring and washers and dryers with unique textures to create a space that you'll be proud to call home. Our varied floor plans offer unique options, including balconies in select units and large closets. We are committed to offering the best and we'd love to have you see for yourself on a tour! Pet Policy: PET POLICY OVERVIEW Dogs and cats are welcome at our community. All pet residents must have their health check, shots and be spayed or neutered upon move-in. A signed Animal Addendum is required to be on file at our leasing office. Two (2) max pets allowed. Still close to highways and neighborhood destinations, Maybeck at the Bend offers a quiet retreat from the hustle and bustle of city life. Embrace nature at the Tualatin River National Wildlife Refuge, Cook Park, Oswego Lake, and Copper Mountain Nature Park nearby. Thanks to our peaceful surroundings, our residents are able to enjoy spending time on their over-sized patios and balconies without distractions! We are a non-smoking community and our staff is dedicated to outstanding customer service as well as professionally maintaining the lush landscaping and community grounds. We are a pet friendly community and near a multitude of parks and walking trails! Recently named one of the top 50 best cities to live in the U.S. by Business Insider, Portland gives its residents a well-rounded city experience of weird, cool, and technologically driven. Deposit: Call Call Today! show contact info Description: Maddox Apartments in North Portland offers a stylish selection of one- and two-bedroom apartment homes to fit your lifestyle. All our apartments provide the latest features and amenities, boasting wood-style plank flooring, vaulted ceilings, and private balconies and patios. No matter which layout you select, in-home laundry and oversized closets set an uncommon standard for living. In addition to a thriving neighborhood, you'll have close access to shopping, dining, parks, and local entertainment. Step into a life of ease with our friendly community. Contact us today! Enjoy stainless steel appliances, modern electric fireplaces, and open floor plans at our 1, 2, and 3 bedroom apartments in Beaverton. Imagine yourself diving into a local lifestyle that surrounds you with feelings of exploration, adventure, and relaxation. Experience our thriving community, and experience better living. Join Baseline Woods today.
